calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-20-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Solep-Matley.
Petitioner: Yelena Margulis, present in pro per for the Minor: Viktoria Mironenko, and with the Minor's father: Ivan Aleksandrovich Mironenko.
Parties were sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: Viktoria Maria Mironenko.
Decree signed in open court.

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name
Off Calendar May-27-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day for name change..
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Yvonne Lee

Petitioner: Yelena Margulis, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The matter is taken off calendar, there is not proof of publication for today's date and petition is missing minor's father signature.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-30-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Petitioner Yelena Margulis present in pro per for the minor, was sworn and examined.
All Notices required by law have NOT been given.
The "Consent of Father, Ivan Mironenko, to Name Change of Minor, Viktoria Mironenko." received and filed in court. The Declaration dated 02-22-04, under penalty of perjury was not signed by the minor's father.
The Court finds that all allegations in the the Petition are NOT true and sufficient.
The Petition is DENIED without prejudice.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-17-2004 Reset To Mar-30-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner Yelena Margulis present in pro per for the minor, was sworn and examined.
The Court continued this matter to March 30, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. for Petitioner to serve notice of the new hearing date on the minor's father with proof of service, and/or to file an amended ATTACHMENT with signature.
